title: ORGANIC ACID-FE COMPLEX AS A DISTURBING FACTOR IN THE TITRIMETRIC ESTIMATION OF ASCORBIC ACID.
author: K. P. BASU
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Organic acid—Fe" complexes can act as disturbing factors in the estimation of ascorbic and with Tillmans' reagent 2 : 6-dichlorophenol-indophenol) even in the acid medium. Quantitative investigation of reducing properties of some of these acid—Fe" complexes has been made. The method of precipitation with mercuric acetate cannot remove citric add—Fe" completely (elimination =   87%).
steps_raw: Organic acid—Fe" complexes can act as disturbing factors in the estimation of ascorbic and with Tillmans' reagent 2 : 6-dichlorophenol-indophenol) even in the acid medium. Quantitative investigation of reducing properties of some of these acid—Fe" complexes has been made. The method of precipitation with mercuric acetate cannot remove citric add—Fe" completely (elimination =   87%).
